title: Adding Weight to Items for Accurate Progress Tracking
excerpt: The items in each project need the ability to be weighted so that there is accurate progress tracking. For example, as is, “remove roof” and “email client contract” have the same weight and marking them complete would ad…

posts.author: AshPowers (Ashton Powers)
posts.cookedHtml: The items in each project need the ability to be weighted so that there is accurate progress tracking. For example, as is, “remove roof” and “email client contract” have the same weight and marking them complete would add the same amount of progress to the project. However, emailing the client takes about 2 minutes and removing the roof takes 4 days. So marking “remove roof” complete should advance the progress bar further than “email client contract”.

posts.author: Ultraviolet (A. Albaajari)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi there - have you ever gotten a response or a solution to add weightages to tasks? I’ve been having the exact same issue.
